details: The postinstall hook (node index.js) executes an IIFE that HTTP GETs a JavaScript payload from internal-mirror[.]southindia[.]cloudapp[.]azure[.]com:5000/1week_utils-helper.js, then compiles and runs it via Module._compile. This is a remote code fetch-and-execute (second-stage downloader) against a non-standard host on port 5000 — not an allowlisted installer. No legitimate purpose for fetching arbitrary code at install time. The small 552-byte stub is consistent with a minimal downloader that pulls the real payload from the C2 server.
